title: Definitions
doc_html:
§2502.  Definitions

The term "Authority" means the Louisiana Educational Television Authority, and when used in connection with action authorized to be taken by the Authority, means the Authority acting by and through its members.

Added by Acts 1971, No. 13, §2.
